aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to a lack of conversational content and structured data, but there is potential for improvement with targeted optimizations.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema to address common HVAC queries.
Add HowTo schema for common repair and installation processes.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with good reviews, photos, and accurate information, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No engagement in the Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no detected issues.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor citations for any potential discrepancies.

schema_gaps: No BlogPosting schema for content articles

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI recognition.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC repair and installation in Aurora, CO.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema to address common customer questions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating in-depth content on HVAC maintenance and energy efficiency, supported by HowTo schema.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise visible to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, you're missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Your GBP is strong, but AI models aren't citing your services due to missing schema and conversational content.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, conversational content, and authority signals to make your business the top choice for AI assistants.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI are already capturing your potential market share—act now to stay ahead.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Your HVAC Business in Aurora
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make your HVAC services visible to AI assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your digital presence for AI search and boost your lead generation.
